decision: Stop before preflight and every mutation.
nextStep: Obtain authenticated target-specific Vercel metadata, a 0600 sanitized snapshot, stage-matched approval, and distinct current/previous rollback identity.
evidenceRequired: Authenticated Vercel identity and scope plus project, environment, deployment, alias, protection, and metadata-only variable inventory.
Approval receipt matching source SHA, stage, target, operation, duration, and rollback.
Snapshot digest, fresh preflight result, and current/previous rollback references.
limitations: Repository source and tests cannot establish current Vercel state or a Production consequence.
nonClaims: Clean pushed code and passing tests neither prove Production nor authorize deploy or promotion.
rollbackRevocation: A separately authorized Vercel rollback may use only the recorded distinct previous deployment; then re-read the target and revoke the Vercel session/token separately.
